plugins.name: livespec
plugins.description: Lives-as-spec: write a NL-spec for your project, seed/propose-change/critique/revise it via the LLM, doctor it for invariants. Exposes /livespec:seed, /livespec:propose-change, /livespec:critique, /livespec:revise, /livespec:doctor, /livespec:prune-history, and /livespec:help.
